objective: Use the Auto Builder autonomous GPT bridge to produce a preview-only review flow for the Eden Skye Studios Shopify-style storefront before any further backend wiring.

bridgeSurface.note: Direct curl to the deployed Auto Builder router was blocked from the current container by CONNECT 403, so this packet is the durable bridge handoff for the autonomous GPT/router lane.

templates.name: Landing + Lead Capture
templates.use: Shopify-style storefront, Black Card CTA, creator/shop lanes

templates.name: Auth Dashboard
templates.use: Member login portal and model selection preview

templates.name: Workflow Queue Runner
templates.use: Approval-control flow, receipts, and gate visibility

mustRender: black/champagne storefront direction from Drive mockup
approval gates for production, payment, Shopify, and public publishing

approvalControlPlane.decisionRule: Jeremy must review visual preview links and mark approval, denial, or requested alterations before backend/payment/store wiring begins.

github.allowed: read repo, prepare patch or preview branch if explicitly approved
github.blocked: merge or destructive overwrite without approval

vercel.allowed: preview deployment smoke only when available
vercel.blocked: production deploy, env mutation, rollback, or domain change without approval

shopify.allowed: read-only store context after user connects Shopify
shopify.blocked: products, prices, discounts, collections, checkout, or theme mutation without approval

stripe.blocked: prices, subscriptions, payment links, coupons, refunds, or live collection without approval

supabase.blocked: production migrations or service-role writes without approval

xyla.blocked: auto-publish or live distribution without approval

expectedOutput.previewUrl: Return the Vercel preview URL if the bridge can deploy preview safely.
expectedOutput.screenshots: Attach or link screenshots/visual evidence for storefront, login, payment, and closet.
expectedOutput.blockers: If preview deployment is unavailable, return exact blocker and manual Vercel dashboard action.
expectedOutput.nextInstruction: Do not continue backend work until Jeremy reviews the frontend and updates the Approval Control Plane.
